title: Arrow Display
description: This mod allows you to see how much arrows you have in your inventory
body:
# Arrow Display
# [Discontinued] the new version can be found [here](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/arrow-counter)

This mod allows you to see how much arrows you have in your inventory



If you hold bow in mainhand or offhand you can see small thing under crosshair

and the nuber is how much arrows you currently has in inventory
![Example of arrow counter below crosshair](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b3d7bc514f8db52162c1cc9a9db44226a837c65f.png)



It acceps every arrow tagged ```minecraft:arrows```




Costumization

By pressing **N** key, you can switch between _under crosshair_ and _above crosshair_

[![Ko-fi](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7687f60c02535d479dc55156b8de1a776f63ebbb.png)](https://ko-fi.com/tejty)

[![Custom mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b2e75104b0340c21d2685ed2d81a8ee8b1be0936.png)](https://ko-fi.com/tejty/commissions)

[![Discord](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/988472/description_ab810526-bb00-4248-9150-47c044ec2d87.png)](https://discord.gg/xByznP7RHw)
